mapper.sql: id, merchant_id, name, price_cents, enabled, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_items (merchant_id, name, price_cents, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{priceCents}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM menu_items WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM menu_items WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE menu_items SET name = #{name}, price_cents = #{priceCents}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId}
